video.description: Source video to re-sync. Must be a publicly accessible URL.
video.title: Video

audio.description: Audio file to sync lips to. Must be a publicly accessible URL.
audio.title: Audio

mode.description: Lipsync mode. 'speed' is faster, 'precision' is higher quality.
mode.title: Mode

enable_caption.description: Generate captions for the output video.
enable_caption.title: Enable Caption

disable_music_track.description: Remove background music from the output.
disable_music_track.title: Disable Music Track

start_time.description: Start time in seconds for partial lipsync.
start_time.title: Start Time

end_time.description: End time in seconds for partial lipsync.
end_time.title: End Time
